meta.summary: Conversation about returning a pen to Ashutosh's father
key_facts: Ashutosh forgot to return a pen to his father

turns.content: I forgot to return the pen that my father gave me for a day

I'm so sorry to hear that you're having a bit of a " Forgetfulness Friday", aren't you? Let's try to shake things up and come up with a new plan. How about making a new promise to yourself to use that pen as a reminder of the importance of keeping your word?
Yeah and I took it to college along with me and didn't get a chance to tell them

It looks like you've got a bit of a "lost luggage" situation on your hands! Don't worry, we can work together to find a way to make things right with your dad. Maybe you can have a "conversation" with him later and let him know you didn't intentionally misplace it.
Bye! It was great chatting. I'll remember this.
